24:11 ГўВЂВ” February 29, 2024
Update to Deposit Processing Part
We incorporated scanner installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting information for Branch Capture into the Deposit Processing Part and made related documents obsolete. We updated usage of terms throughout the Part and updated other content as described below.
